plan: TruncDate.as_sql (line 295) and TruncTime.as_sql (line 308) compute tzname via timezone.get_current_timezone_name() if settings.USE_TZ else None, discarding self.tzinfo even though TruncBase inherits TimezoneMixin. Replace that expression in both methods with self.get_tzname(), which already returns the passed-in tzinfo's name when set and falls back to the current timezone under USE_TZ. Single-file fix: the tzname state is produced in these as_sql overrides in django/db/models/functions/datetime.py; backend datetime_cast_date/time_sql hooks are mere consumers and need no changes.
